faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about our Video Compressor
faq.q1: Does it cost money to use this video compressor?
faq.a1: Yes, VideoCompressorPro is a free video compressor online tool, which allows you to compress video without any complicated software or hidden cost and also to reduce the video file size quickly.
faq.q2: Will I be able to use this video compressor tool on my mobile phone?
faq.a2: Yes, our video compressor online will run smoothly on Android, iPhone, tablet, laptop and desktop on any modern browser.
faq.a3: Just upload your video, select compression parameters and our intelligent video compression technology will optimize the file size while preserving high-quality video.
faq.q4: How to shrink Video without Quality Loss?
faq.a4: Adjust your compression settings so they're balanced; reduce file size but maintain resolution and bit rate. VideoCompressorPro is designed to compress video without any loss of quality.
faq.q5: How can I play a compressed video?
faq.a5: Compressed videos function in the same way as regular video files, and can be played on devices such as phones, laptops, browsers, media players, and social media sites.
faq.q6: What's the best video encoder to compress?
faq.a6: One of the most widely-used video encoders is H.264 which offers high compression, smooth playback, and good compatibility between devices.
faq.q7: Does VideoCompressorPro have a video upload limit?
faq.a7: The upload performance will vary according to the browser you are using and the resources on your device but our online video compressor is optimized for easy small and large video files to upload.
faq.a8: VideoCompressorPro is employed by businesses, creators, marketers, educators, editors and social media teams for professional video compression workflows.
faq.q9: Is there any software to download or install?
faq.a9: There is no installation needed. This online video compressor is used straight from the browser to compress video easily and quickly.
faq.q10: Is VideoCompressorPro actually a Free software?
faq.a10: Yes, there's a way to compress videos online for free, with no subscription, downloads or complicated setups.
faq.q11: Which video file formats do I have to compress?
faq.a11: Commonly used video file formats include MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, MPEG and more that can be compressed.
faq.q12: How to reduce the size of a video?
faq.a12: Upload your video, select the compression level you want and download a compressed version of your video that is smaller and smoother.
faq.q13: What are the ways to minimize the size of MP4 files?
faq.a13: Reduce the video compression level, bitrate, or resolution without compromising quality and visual fidelity with our MP4 video compressor.
faq.q14: How to compress a video without losing quality?
faq.a14: Select optimum compression parameters to take into account how much video quality you need and how much disc space you want to save. VideoCompressorPro is developed to accomplish good quality compression.
faq.q15: Why is it important to change the quality of a video?
faq.a15: Adjusting video quality optimises file size for website, social media, email attachments, cloud storage and upload speed.
faq.q16: Is it possible to change the bitrate, frames per second (FPS), resolution and CRF?
faq.a16: Yes, you can adjust bitrate, FPS, resolution, and CRF to get the output that you want and the file size that you need.
faq.q17: How many frames per second are there in a 1-minute, 4K video?
faq.a17: A 4K video, before compression, can be as large as several hundred megabytes to multiple gigabytes depending on the Bit-rate and codec used.
faq.q18: Is it possible to upload 4k videos to Instagram?
faq.a18: Yes, you can upload high resolution videos to Instagram, but you can also make the uploads faster by compressing the 4K videos first, then upload them to Instagram.
faq.q19: Is it possible to compress videos for Discord?
faq.a19: Yes, our Discord video compressor can help you to identify the file size for uploads without compromising video quality.
faq.q20: Is there any mobile video compression support in this tool?
faq.a20: Yes, you can compress videos straight from the cell phone browser without installation of any application, for Android and iPhone.
faq.q21: Will my video be safe while being compressed?
faq.a21: Yes, VideoCompressorPro is developed with privacy and protection in mind, and you can be sure that your video files will be protected during processing.
faq.q22: Can I shrink big 4K videos or HD videos?
faq.a22: Yes, our video compressor can compress video at HD and 4K resolution for easier video sharing, storage and faster video uploading.
faq.q23: Is compression going to impact video quality?
faq.a23: Quality may be slightly diminished in compression, depending on setting, but our smart video compression system is designed to maintain maximum clarity.
faq.q24: May I compress videos to send by email?
faq.a24: Yes, you can certainly resize video files so that they are smaller and easier to share via email, and upload faster, without any fancy editing software.
faq.q25: Which is the optimum format for compression?
faq.a25: MP4 is one of the best options since it is smaller in file size, highly compatible and doesn't compromise on video quality.

to_text_page.steps_title: How to Transcribe Video to Text
to_text_page.s1_desc: Choose any video file from your device to start the transcription. Our tool supports MP4, MOV, and AVI formats.
to_text_page.s2_desc: Choose the language spoken in your video to optimize the AI transcription engine for maximum accuracy.
to_text_page.s3_desc: Click 'Start Transcription'. Our engine will process the audio locally and generate your text in real-time.
to_text_page.s4_desc: Review your text and download it in your preferred format. Your data remains private and secure throughout the process.
to_text_page.r1_text: The accuracy is surprising for a free tool. It saved me hours of manual captioning for my YouTube channel.
to_text_page.r2_text: I love that it works entirely on my device. I can transcribe sensitive interview recordings without any privacy concerns.
to_text_page.r3_text: Perfect for taking notes from recorded lectures. The timestamps make it easy to find specific parts of the video.
to_text_page.a1: Our AI engine provides up to 95% accuracy for clear audio. Results may vary based on background noise and audio quality.
to_text_page.q2: Is my video uploaded to a server?
to_text_page.a2: No. Like all our tools, Video to Text processes your files locally in your browser using WebAssembly. Your privacy is guaranteed.
to_text_page.a3: We currently support English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, and many others. You can select the language before starting.

about_page.hero_subtitle: We believe that you shouldn't have to sacrifice your personal data just to shrink a video file. That's why we built a tool that works entirely on your device.
about_page.story_p1: In 2024, our founders noticed a disturbing trend: most "free" online video tools were actually data harvesting machines. To compress a simple video, you had to upload it to a server you didn't control, wait in a queue, and hope your private content was safe.
about_page.story_p2: We decided to change that. By leveraging modern browser technology like WebAssembly, we created a platform that delivers professional-grade video processing without ever asking for your data.
about_page.v1_desc: Zero uploads. Your files stay on your device, exactly where they belong.
about_page.v2_desc: Local processing means no upload or download queues. Instant results.
about_page.v3_desc: Professional video tools should be accessible to everyone, without hidden costs.

contact_page.hero_subtitle: Have a feature request, found a bug, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you. Our team typically responds within 24 hours.
contact_page.info2_desc: Get instant help from our team.
contact_page.info3_desc: Follow us for updates and tips.

format_page.subtitle: Reduce the file size of your {format} videos instantly in your browser. No data leaves your device. 100% secure, fast, and free.
format_page.v1_desc: Our advanced algorithms shrink your {format} file size by up to 90% while keeping the visual quality perfectly clear.
format_page.v2_desc: Your {format} videos are never uploaded to any server. All processing happens locally on your own device.
format_page.v3_desc: Utilizing WebAssembly, we harness your device's raw power to compress {format} files faster than cloud-based tools.

comparison.title: Why Choose VideoCompressorPro?
comparison.subtitle: Experience the next generation of video processing right in your browser.

visualizer.title: Smart Video Compression for Clear & Smaller Files
visualizer.desc: The advanced video compressor helps to minimize video size without compromising video quality, including sharpness and smooth playback. Save space, share more easily, and upload video files faster with online compression without losing quality.

discord.title: Free Video Compressor for Discord Uploads
discord.desc: The Discord video compressor is designed to compress large video files to meet Discord's video upload limit of 25MB while preserving the best possible quality. Quickly compress video for easy sharing, quick uploads and great video playback on desktop and mobile devices.

feature_grid.title: Advanced Online Video Compressor pro Features
feature_grid.desc: Compress videos with ease, effectively shrink video file sizes, and benefit from smart video compression tools for creators, businesses, students, gamers and everyone else.
feature_grid.f1_desc: Adjust the quality, resolution and file size of compressed video files. Our Online Video Compressor allows you to compress videos easily to use on the website, email, storage and social media sharing without complicated tools.
feature_grid.f2_desc: VideoCompressorPro secures your video files while being compressed using secure video compression in the browser. In case you need a free video compressor for your own or for your work, your uploaded videos remain protected all along the way.
feature_grid.f3_desc: Compress MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM and many more formats using our video file compressor. Online Video Compression benefits in the fast uploads, easy sharing and lesser storage use over devices.
feature_grid.f4_desc: Use our smart video compressor online free tool to compress videos online within seconds. Download video size free without compromising the playback and viewing quality of video on desktop and mobile devices.
feature_grid.f5_desc: Our free Online Video Compressor was designed to be simple and easy to use for beginners. Upload, compress video size and download optimized video without technical skills and software installation.
feature_grid.f6_desc: VideoCompressorPro can compress video without compromising its quality with its smart compression optimization technology. Resize video to discord, websites, email attachments, cloud storage and social media without hassle.

use_cases.title: Real-Life Ways People Use VideoCompressorPro
use_cases.desc: Whether for social media or business workflows, our online video compressor can quickly compress video files to make them easier to upload, store and share on any device.
use_cases.i1_title: Share Videos Faster on Email & WhatsApp
use_cases.i1_desc: Sending big video files via email or messaging apps might be challenging. VideoCompressorPro allows you to compress video files in a matter of seconds, enabling you to share video clips, presentations, tutorials and family videos without worrying about upload problems or file size limits.
use_cases.i2_desc: Discord upload limits are frequently exceeded with gaming clips or screen recording. In a community, chat or streaming group, our video compressor for Discord reduces video size without sacrificing quality.
use_cases.i3_title: Save Storage Space on Mobile & Desktop
use_cases.i3_desc: It's easy to fill up the phone, laptop and cloud storage with high-quality videos. Download and use our complimentary video compressor online to compress video files and maintain storage organization without losing valuable video content.
use_cases.i4_desc: Compress videos for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and Facebook uploads without noticeable loss in quality. Smaller video files upload quicker and streamline content publishing processes.
use_cases.i5_desc: VideoCompressorPro is used by businesses to compress presentations, promotional videos, tutorials, and product demos for quicker collaboration, upload to cloud storage or optimization for websites.
use_cases.i6_title: Make Large Videos Easier to Store & Transfer
use_cases.i6_desc: Compress long recordings, webinars, and events for easy storage and sharing. Our tool helps you manage your video assets more efficiently.
